title: How do the MP Evas see
display_title: How do the MP Evas see
wikitext:
[]: How do the MP Evas see?             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed Jul 26, 2006 11:03 pm Look at those harpies. They have no eyes. Only a big mouth with thick lips that always give you that stupid smile. Have anyone thought about how they see things? Maybe their eyes are located inside their mouths?

[]:             Quote Post by System Shocker » Thu Jul 27, 2006 12:17 am smell-o-vision

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 12:20 am they are cute. so they dont need to see

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Thu Jul 27, 2006 12:37 am I always thought they used a sort of Sonar..

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 12:39 am Dr. Strangelove wrote: I always thought they used a sort of Sonar..

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Thu Jul 27, 2006 7:37 am But they can throw the Lance so accurately into Eva 02's eyes!

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Jul 27, 2006 9:14 am Maybe they have very small eyes, we can't see?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 9:34 am Maybe it just doesnt matter

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Jul 27, 2006 9:49 am Evangelionfreak wrote: Maybe it just doesnt matter

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 9:52 am Legend of the Past wrote: Evangelionfreak wrote: Maybe it just doesnt matter

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 27, 2006 11:44 am Perhaps Takeshi Honda didn't take this into account when he designed them?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 11:53 am Maybe they have eyes we just cant see then :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 27, 2006 4:55 pm http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=679 They make like the Pinball Wizard, and play by sense of smell.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Sat Jul 29, 2006 12:28 am DirtyHamster wrote: Ooooh, by the way. You look really huggable in your photo . Off the subject a bit but who cares.

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Sat Jul 29, 2006 2:47 pm They're too 1337 for eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sat Jul 29, 2006 5:54 pm ZeroFive1 wrote: They're too 1337 for eyes.
